source: Compiled from Jal Yoga Ideal User Journey Map PDF

menu.label: I'd like to find out more about Jal Yoga

outlets.name: Woodlands
outlets.address: 8 Woodlands Sq, #04-12/13 Wood Square, Solo 2, Singapore 737713

sections.title: Welcome menu
sections.content: Namaste! Thank you for reaching out to Jal Yoga. To help us handle your request as quickly as possible, please let us know what you're looking for today: 1. Schedule a Trial. 2. I'm a current member. 3. I'd like to find out more about Jal Yoga. 4. Corporate / Partnerships. 5. Staff Hub.

sections.title: Schedule a Trial
sections.content: For a trial, ask which studio the user would like to visit. Options: Alexandra, Katong, Kovan, Upper Bukit Timah, Woodlands. Then ask for the user's full name. Then ask for the user's fitness goal. Final reply: Thank you! I've sent your details to the selected studio team. Our Studio Manager will drop you a WhatsApp within 24 hours to schedule your trial.

sections.title: Current member support menu
sections.content: Current member menu: Class Cancellation, Membership Suspension, I need help with my class booking. There is also a referral flow in the document.

sections.title: Class cancellation
sections.content: No worries, we understand! You can cancel directly via the Jal Yoga app. Just a reminder to do it at least 2 hours before class to avoid a booking penalty.

sections.title: Membership suspension intro
sections.content: For membership suspension, ask whether the request is a Medical Suspension or Travel Suspension. Options: Medical, Travel.

sections.title: Medical suspension
sections.content: Medical Suspension: We are sorry to hear that you aren't feeling your best, and we want to ensure you have the time you need to focus on your recovery. As this is a Medical Suspension, we can waive the standard extension fee provided we have the necessary documentation. Documentation: please share a valid memo or certificate from a certified physician stating the recommended period of rest. Duration: medical suspensions are processed in blocks of one month. Membership Extension: your membership expiry date will be adjusted based on the total duration of your suspension once the documentation is verified. Final reply: Our Customer Care team will review your request and get back to you within 48 hours.

sections.title: Travel suspension
sections.content: Travel Suspension: Extension Fee: a fee of S$50 per month of suspension applies to maintain your membership status. Duration: suspensions are processed in one-month blocks, up to a maximum of 3 months. Expiry Adjustment: your membership expiry date will be extended by the duration of the suspension once the fee is processed. Next Steps: once received, our Customer Care team will be in touch within the next 48 hours.

sections.title: Class booking help
sections.content: For class booking help: We'd be happy to assist you with your booking. To make sure we give you the right information, could you let us know a bit more? Final reply: Our Customer Care team will review your response and get back to you shortly.

sections.title: Refer a friend
sections.content: Refer a Friend: That's amazing! We love meeting friends of our Jal Yoga community. Please ask for: 1. Friend's Name. 2. Friend's Contact Number. 3. Preferred Studio (Woodlands, Kovan, or Upper Bukit Timah). Once you've sent that over, our team will reach out to them with a special invitation. Note: don't forget to ask them to mention your name when they sign up so we can look after both of you.

sections.title: Studio locations and operating hours
sections.content: Studio Locations: Alexandra: 456 Alexandra Rd, #02-03, Singapore 119962. Katong: 131 E Coast Rd, #03-01, Singapore 428816. Kovan: 1F Yio Chu Kang Rd, Singapore 545512. Upper Bukit Timah: 816 Upper Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 678149. Woodlands: 8 Woodlands Sq, #04-12/13 Wood Square, Solo 2, Singapore 737713. Operating Hours: Mon - Fri: 7.30am – 9.00pm. Sat - Sun: 9.30am - 5.00pm.

sections.title: Class types
sections.content: We offer over 30 different types of classes across our 5 studios, so there is truly something for everybody. Classes generally fall into the following groups: Yoga: from foundational Hatha to energetic Vinyasa and relaxing Yin. Yoga Therapy is available if you have back, neck, or shoulder pain. Pilates & Barre: both Mat Pilates and Reformer Pilates to help you build core strength and better posture. Infrared Heat: these classes use special panels to heat your body directly. It's a deeper stretch and a great detox without the stuffy feeling of traditional hot yoga. Most classes are beginner-friendly.

sections.title: Class schedule
sections.content: You can view the class schedule here: https://www.jalyoga.com.sg/jal-schedule/. Tip: remember to toggle to your preferred studio. Users can be asked whether they would like to book a free trial.

sections.title: Studio policy
sections.content: Studio Policy: Class Booking Policy: class bookings can be made via the Jal Yoga App up to 3 days in advance, starting from 2:00 PM. Example: to book a class on 31 December, bookings open on 28 December at 2:00 PM. Class Cancellation Policy: you may cancel your booking without penalty up to 2 hours before the class starts. Cancellations made less than 2 hours before class or no-shows are considered late cancellations. After 3 late cancellations, booking access on the Jal Yoga App will be suspended for 7 calendar days. Suspension Policy: for non-medical suspensions, an extension fee of S$50 per month applies, with a maximum suspension period of 3 months. An extension beyond membership expiry will be granted based on the suspension duration. Medical suspensions require valid documentation from a certified physician for exemption from the policy.

sections.title: Current events and retreats
sections.content: Stay updated on our latest events and international retreats. Follow our social channels for exclusive announcements: Instagram @jalyogasg and Telegram https://t.me/jalyogasingapore.

sections.title: Corporate and Partnerships
sections.content: Corporate & Partnerships: We're always excited to explore new collaborations and wellness opportunities. Ask for: 1. Full Name. 2. Work Email Address. 3. Company Name (Optional). Once received, the corporate team will reach out within 48 hours to discuss opportunities. Follow-up reply: your information has been forwarded to our Partnerships Team, and they will get back to you via email within 48 hours.

sections.title: Staff Hub
sections.content: Staff Hub: Hey Team! To help us block out your space, please drop the details below: Member Name, Date & Time, Studio Location & Room. Final reply: We've sent your booking request to the studio. We'll double-check the schedule and update you shortly.

sections.title: Speak to Customer Service
sections.content: Please let us know how we can help you. Simply type your enquiry below. While our response may not be immediate, our Customer Service team will review your message and get back to you right here as soon as possible. We look forward to assisting you.

sections.title: End Chat
sections.content: End Chat: If daytime, say: Is there anything else we can assist you with today? If not, we'll close this ticket in a moment. Wishing you a wonderful and mindful day ahead. If evening or night, say: Is there anything else we can assist you with today? If not, we'll close this ticket for now. Wishing you a restful and peaceful evening ahead.
